author: Loveday Anyim
review: Edit: Thank you for the prompt response via App Update of May 11. Booklet and Opt-in Contactless Biometric Enrolment Payments are now seamless. I can Understand why, but it locks in the User into making a payment they can't change. If a user wants the passport fast, but fails Biometrics, it locks them in to the Enrolment Centre and gives zero flexibility to make proper decisions. Also, adding Application Name in the Biometrics Payment page will reduce user confusion. Thank You.

author: David Abel
review: I can't find the option to start a passport application after downloading the app. Physical appointment available on NIS website is in six months time. I am frustrated, Nigeria let's try to create excellent and efficient systems please, it's not that hard 😔

author: U_Anthony
review: Waste of time and resources. I completed my passport renewal application and biometrics on the app as well as payment. When I track my passport, it shows fingerprints verification failed. There is no option to do the biometrics again. customer care not responding to mails ,phone switch off . I have to book an appointment for Biometrics, which is in 6 months' time . Very horrible experience.

author: Adeshina Olanrewaju
review: This Nigeria Immigration app is rubbish, it will never integrate very well with your Android, is always back and forth issues to continue the application on it.

author: Bowale Adeyemi
review: The worst App so far, The app prevents you from renewing your passport. You can't get hold of anyone in the contact Us page. since 18th of march 2026. contact us has been a useless page. £100 app works better than this useless scam portal. The issue is that after registration it will take you to biometric page instead of allowing you to make a new application for renewal. You can't download a new app widely promoted in YouTube. it's a useless app available in playstore.

author: Ezekiel
review: I understand the app is going through development and all, but at least basic aspects of it should be functional. I was able to pay for my contactless biometric enrollment application and the biometric enrollment was successful, after which I got instructed to mail my old passport with a self-addressed stamped envelope, which I did and it's been almost two months now, no way to fully track what's going on, live chat isn't working, email provided isn't responsive, support phone nmber won't work.

author: Ade Adee
review: I have successfully completed my application on the NIS portal and am now trying to make payment via the app using my Application Number and Reference Number. There are two payment gateway options, one of which is Paystack. I have attempted to pay using my Bank of America debit card and my Wise card, but neither seems to work. I have also cleared my cache several times, but the issue persists. This has been very frustrating

author: Iyamu blessing
review: very very poor, I downloaded and registered, can't even click the passport application service to apply, it keep switching to the next page, kept tying over and over again , still can't start application, Everything naija no dey ever work, poor service, rubbish app. mtchew

author: David Osaro Uwumarogie
review: when I newly downloaded the app, I was able to apply for my passport renewal. I filled everything and uploaded required documents then I saved it to pay later. seems they updated the app and since then it doesn't bring the option to renewal nor request a new passport, only for biometric and digital travel documents - which isn't working either. I cannot continue from where I stopped because I can't find any option on the app to request or continue existing applications. please fix it.

author: Andrew Ailen
review: The App logged me out and suddenly couldn't recognize my login information. I tried to regain access to my account but I couldn't. I've got ongoing applications and an appointment details pending in the account. Why is everything Nigerian always frustrating and regretful!

author: Bukola Adebisi
review: The main purpose of the app is for the contactless passport application, but the app has not been able to fulfill that singular purpose. Fingerprint scanning is terrible, and when you finally succeed in scanning your fingerprints, verification is always failing. Samsung 25 Ultra kept prompting that the app has bug and stopped abruptly and that I should tried updating it when developer fix the problem.

author: muda nas
review: Not working. It get to OTP verification and you input the OTP sent and the app will not respond from there. Trying to renew from outside. On the desktop it said incorrect log in detail or site can not be reached. Minister Olubunmi Tunji Ojo meant well by introducing it but officers frustrated it. They make money from people doing the processing directly. They collect as much as they could over the official rate. Pls help Nigeria. Who can? Who will? Go after the IT dept.

author: ADARAMAJA OLUWAFUNSHO
review: I complete my passport renewal application on the NIS website and downloaded the app to complete the contactless application, but ever since I downloaded the app 2 days ago, each time I click to open the app, it only shows loading and won't even leave that stage.

author: ShowBOX AFRICA The Adult
review: Understand where people get it wrong; This app does exactly what it says it does. And very smoothly. Understand that your login to the NIS application is for the applications... Most people create the application on the PC, and then the username and password are rejected when trying to log in for biometrics on the app. The app is meant to confirm your status and prepare you for biometrics, so you need to create a fresh profile for the sake of the app. This is not normal though. NIS take note!

author: Chuks Umeani
review: soon as you select contactless service, entire server breaks each time you try logging in or selecting biometric service. also doesn't offer the redirect to the payment portal. just an incplete application page. Horrible experience and customer support

author: Rebecca Anyanwu
review: I applied for renewal on the website, got my application number and reference number. but when I went to the app to put in those numbers to start biometrics it keeps telling me 'Eligibility failed' and 'cannot fetch application'.

author: Business Inc.
review: The worst ever. Biometrics is a joke. Was this even tested? Support is non-existent. Tunji-Ojo (Minister of Interior) ahould be ashamed that he let this very expensive app be deployed. The developers are not serious. Fix it. $330. $100+ fee & this is the best they could do?

author: David Sanmi L
review: Worst app ever used and you called this a government official app. In contrast, it took me 15 mins to renew my British passport and receive it in under 2 weeks. While it took NIS app over 2 weeks to accept my biometrics even after inputting my NIN. it is over a month now; 1. no communication from the high commission to state acknowledge 2. no new update in app still stuck in the same position over 1 month now! I honestly understand the everyday frustration of the average Nigerian!

author: Nwaobi chinonso
review: Horrible App. The app on my phone does not display a tab to start a new application or any lead to start an application, once you open it, you only see biometric enrollment.I have done all I could and nothing happened. The customer service chat connected me to one useless Isa who wouldn't respond to my chat for a whole 24 hours Then the phone that says open 24/7 says number is switched off. Nigeria will always be Nigeria no doubt.. At least do one thing right and change the narrative for once

author: Damola Peter
review: I used it and it worked, I was very surprised but it worked. Kudos to the people in charge of this initiative. I think an official guide video on how to use the app along with the NIS website will help clear a lot of confusions though. Nigeria well done!

author: Olufolabi Meshileya
review: Initially I spent 2 weeks waiting to upload my pics. kept getting an error message. I couldn't tell if the error was my fault of the system. after the update,my pics went through. Now, I have been trying to pay for 2 weeks now. the payment gateway won't open. I open tickets and get no response. I call the lines but no one picks up or reaches back. I know it's early stages and hopefully we can sort out these challenges timely.

author: Crystal Akpan
review: The whole process is frustrating, the app is not working. Am wondering why everything about Naija won't stick work. Honestly, just to renew a passport is so frustrating.

author: Saima Judge
review: can you please fix the bug. I can't get pass the face capture stage. it keeps crashing after take the picture.

author: ifeanyi Emmanuel Okafor
review: i have been trying to capture my face and it kept telling me there is a bug, i should update when the developer fixes it. this now almost a week and i am still not able to capture common face. this is a terrible experience.

author: Daniel Adeniyi Sodimu
review: I have completed the basic application and paid, then realised I had to do the biometric capture for the contactless application. recognised my face just fine. However, ut after the fingerprints were not recognised the first time (maybe because of the table in the background), it said "failed" and would not allow me to re-capture and try again. This means I'll have to wait months for an in-person appointment instead of weeks for contactless. It is so close but so far from being a solid app.

author: ISAIAH A
review: The app is incredibly frustrating to use! Please fix this! I created a profile and reached the email verification stage, where the app was supposed to send me a code or link. However, I kept getting an error message saying it failed to send the verification email at this time. I tried again later, but now I can’t log in at all because my email needs to be verified first. How am I supposed to verify it after 24 hours if I can’t even access my account? This needs to be addressed!

author: Samuel Theophilus
review: Not a perfect app but far better than none. I finally completed my enrollment using this app. For those having issues with this app after completing the form using the website, try deleting your application and starting all over again.

author: Ayotunde Akola
review: Beyond frustrating. I am still stuck on getting biometrics done. No progress bar to show status of biometrics verification Live chat for support does not work. The worst app ever made.

author: Victor Aladi
review: Website allows SSO login/sign up, yet the app only allows email/password login. Also, no provision or settings on the website to associate an email address with your account for login. If you created your account on the website using SSO, the app, in its current state, is basically useless to you.

author: linda igwe (Galflamour Medical Care)
review: treat as urgent app is useless frustrating ,do you know my children and is not able to use this app ,I have been trying after finger print and this app held me in 60 percent verification in progress till infinity ,redownloaded the app and started afresh still same problem app at 60 percent after capturing finger ,very difficult to capture finger ,can some one help me out my passport is about expiring not everyone has money to fly in nigeria to renew passport ,London is having same issue

author: Akinolu Sanda
review: I can attach a screenshot of the issue this app has. It is stuck in passport biometric enrolment - I haven't even applied for the passport yet.

author: Omode Bowale
review: Nigeria has too many brilliant UI/UX designers, software engineers, and PMs who work in big tech firms globally for this kind of app to be published on the PlayStore. The app is a national disgrace. It's the worst app I’ve experienced. Haba! In 2026, our standard should be much higher. Whoever built this app, please invest in better design, engineering, and product leadership in your team.

author: Emeka Onuoha
review: Excited at first, then deeply disappointed, anyways that's Nigeria for you. So some things works fine and some don't. Contactless thingy worked fine for me but after payment no response or way to recall your application in the app. The thing doesn't work. Well, I had to do it the old-fashioned way, made some contacts, and was advised how to go about renewing my passport despite paying the fees in the app. it's worth the trial, though. Just dont expect much from this app, alot doesnt work 😢

author: Oke Michael
review: @NIS what is wrong with your app. For the past two days, the START NEW APPLICATION and CONTINUE EXISTING APPLICATION menu is not there any more. Let's know if you are updating the app.

author: Ikenna Ogwogwo
review: The recent update has cleared the saved progress of my application. I can't even start a new one. please fix this!

author: oluwanifemi Omotoye
review: The app crashes a lot no contact information is provided for help, no phone number or email address listed. you can't even generate a ticket. The app is complex to use. there is no clear communication at all. Communication is complete zero. You do not get email confirmations when something is completed or payment is made. I have had to depend on social media/people's experiences to get needed information. Overall, the app needs a lot of improvement.

author: Udara
review: Absolute trash! I have been unable to get my biometrics done for almost 2 weeks now. lWhat is the use of having this app when it's not working? Also, nobody answers the phone or emails or chats The app keeps telling me "Eligibility Failed. Unable to fetch application" What do you mean eligibility failed when the airline has confirmed I won't be able to board because of my less than 6 months validity?!

author: Olugbenga Oke
review: App works fine initially, the process flow of the application could be better. Customer service, updates, feedback and responses to inquiries are very poor, status update of passport renewal application is not real time. I have been contacting them for over 3 weeks no response or feedback. There was no confirmation of receipt from the High commission. Very poor communication.

author: Dee Benebo
review: Unable to use the app after creating/registering a profile as the app is yet to send an otp to my registered email no matter how many times I keep selecting 'Resend OTP'. Don't know if this is due to there being a set time of the day that the app can send OTPs or what. Either way, it would be great if the developers can look into if there's a glitch with sending OTPs to people's registered emails.

author: Clinton Mbachu
review: Biometric capture is the hardest part of this app. It didn’t work on my Samsung Tab S7+ or iPhone 16 Pro Max (kept giving errors), but I eventually succeeded with an iPhone 14 Pro. Seems not fully optimized for newer iPhones yet. Works better on Android devices with good cameras and iPhone 15 and below. However, it saved me the cost and stress of traveling to Ottawa since I’m based in Winnipeg, Canada.
